skills.name: experiment-planner
skills.description: Plan deep-learning and computer-science research ideas as claim-driven, pilot-first experiment matrices.
skills.example_prompt: $experiment-planner Turn this collaborative perception idea into the smallest viable validation experiment.

skills.name: research-evidence
skills.description: Search academic evidence, verify citation metadata, and check whether sources support research claims.
skills.example_prompt: $research-evidence Check whether this related-work claim is supported by CVPR, ICCV, or ECCV papers.
requirements: Optional paper-search MCP or RefChecker backends

skills.name: search-first
skills.description: Search for maintained tools, libraries, skills, research, and proven patterns before building a custom solution.
skills.example_prompt: $search-first Find maintained tools and libraries before we build this dataset utility.

skills.name: ui-ux-pro-max
skills.description: Design and review accessible web and mobile interfaces with a searchable UI/UX knowledge base.
skills.example_prompt: $ui-ux-pro-max Review this settings dashboard for accessibility, spacing, typography, interaction states, and responsive layout.
requirements: Python 3 for the bundled design search scripts

skills.name: app-feature-craft
skills.description: Build product-grade app features across UX, frontend, backend, tests, and end-to-end verification.
skills.example_prompt: $app-feature-craft Implement this background AI workflow with recoverable results, clear states, and regression tests.

skills.name: app-bug-forensics
skills.description: Diagnose user-reported application failures from symptoms and logs through root cause and regression coverage.
skills.example_prompt: $app-bug-forensics Trace why this AI task times out after the provider accepts the request and identify the root cause.

skills.name: app-release-readiness
skills.description: Prepare, package, publish, and verify desktop or web application releases without shipping stale artifacts.
skills.example_prompt: $app-release-readiness Build and verify this Windows installer, then prepare the GitHub release assets.
requirements: Target application's build and packaging toolchain
GitHub CLI for GitHub publishing tasks

skills.name: grill-me
skills.description: Interview a user one decision at a time to stress-test an underspecified plan or design.
skills.example_prompt: $grill-me Stress-test this experiment plan before implementation begins.

skills.name: paper-section-playbook
skills.description: Plan and restructure sections of computer-vision, 3D-perception, and autonomous-driving research papers.
skills.example_prompt: $paper-section-playbook Plan the Related Work and Method structure for this 3D perception paper.

skills.name: paper-refinement-skills
skills.description: Refine research-paper logic and prose while preserving verified claims, terminology, notation, and citation boundaries.
skills.example_prompt: $paper-refinement-skills Tighten this introduction without strengthening unsupported claims.

skills.name: paper-review-panel
skills.description: Run a top-conference-style paper review panel and synthesize readiness risks without editing the manuscript.
skills.example_prompt: $paper-review-panel Review this draft as a CVPR-style panel and identify the highest acceptance risks.

skills.name: rebuttal-response-skills
skills.description: Draft, revise, compress, and stress-test concise author responses grounded only in verified evidence.
skills.example_prompt: $rebuttal-response-skills Draft a concise response to Reviewer 2 using only evidence already present in the paper and logs.

skills.name: paper-framework-figure-studio-pro
skills.description: Plan source-grounded method, architecture, pipeline, system, and agent-workflow figures for CS and deep-learning papers.
skills.example_prompt: $paper-framework-figure-studio-pro Plan a source-grounded method overview figure for this paper without generating images yet.

skills.name: paper-visual-craft
skills.description: Design, redraw, and validate publication-ready research figures and tables while preserving exact evidence.
skills.example_prompt: $paper-visual-craft Redesign this ablation table so reviewers can scan the main evidence quickly.
requirements: The plotting or LaTeX toolchain used by the source artifact
PDF rendering tools for visual verification

skills.name: paper-share-html
skills.description: Create source-grounded, responsive paper presentations with readable PDF-extracted tables, varied explanatory diagrams, optional presenter-paced reveals, and live-talk browser QA.
skills.example_prompt: $paper-share-html Turn this paper into a fluent 15-minute HTML talk, keep extracted tables readable before zoom, use paced reveals only for genuine sequences, and verify desktop, mobile, and print behavior.
requirements: PDF extraction or rendering tools when the source is a PDF
Optional Pillow for automated table-crop checks

skills.name: github-project-release
skills.description: Prepare a clean GitHub project repository with publication audits and controlled release workflows.
skills.example_prompt: $github-project-release Prepare this local project as a clean GitHub repository without datasets, checkpoints, or generated artifacts.
requirements: GitHub CLI for remote repository operations

skills.name: codex-session-restore
skills.description: Diagnose and restore active Codex Desktop sidebar sessions after provider switches without changing authentication.
skills.example_prompt: $codex-session-restore Diagnose missing non-archived sessions after a model-provider switch.
requirements: Python 3 for the bundled recovery script
Local access to the Codex Desktop data directory
